programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.8m @ 14s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
The 1.8m swell and offshore wind suggests a decent session, assuming the usual Cantinho closeouts aren't feeling extra spiteful today.
🌊 Swell: 1.8m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h SSE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 12.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.8m @ 14s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
The 1.8m swell and offshore wind might tempt the gullible, but I've seen cleaner.
🌊 Swell: 1.8m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h SSE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 12.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.title: 🌊 1.6m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
1.6 meters with a crosswind? Might get lucky, might just get sandblasted into the next parish.

programme.desc:

programme.desc:
